## What & why

<!-- Briefly describe the change and the motivation. -->

## Definition of Done (required for every feature)

- [ ] **Unit and/or integration tests** added, created, or refreshed for this change
- [ ] **Documentation** updated/created/refreshed (`docs/**`, `README.md`, and `CHANGELOG.md`)
- [ ] CI is green (lint, tests, Docker build, CodeQL, dependency review)

> The **Feature checklist (tests + docs)** check enforces the first two for any PR
> that touches feature/source code. For genuinely non-feature PRs (pure infra,
> typo fixes), add the **`skip-feature-gate`** label.
